controls.title: Control Environment
controls.statement: Foundational governance: integrity and ethical values, board oversight, organizational structure, commitment to competence, and accountability.

children.title: Commitment to integrity and ethical values
children.statement: Commitment to integrity and ethical values

children.title: Board independence and oversight of internal control
children.statement: Board independence and oversight of internal control

children.title: Management establishes structures, reporting lines, and authority
children.statement: Management establishes structures, reporting lines, and authority

children.title: Commitment to attract, develop, and retain competent people
children.statement: Commitment to attract, develop, and retain competent people

children.title: Individuals are held accountable for internal control responsibilities
children.statement: Individuals are held accountable for internal control responsibilities

controls.title: Communication and Information
controls.statement: The entity obtains relevant quality information and communicates it internally and externally to support the functioning of internal control.

children.title: Use of relevant, quality information
children.statement: Use of relevant, quality information

children.title: Internal communication of objectives and responsibilities
children.statement: Internal communication of objectives and responsibilities

children.title: External communication of relevant matters
children.statement: External communication of relevant matters

controls.title: Risk Assessment
controls.statement: The entity specifies objectives, identifies and analyzes risks to those objectives, assesses fraud risk, and evaluates significant change.

children.title: Specify objectives clearly enough to identify risk
children.statement: Specify objectives clearly enough to identify risk

children.title: Identify and analyze risk to objectives
children.statement: Identify and analyze risk to objectives

children.title: Consider the potential for fraud
children.statement: Consider the potential for fraud

children.title: Identify and assess changes that affect internal control
children.statement: Identify and assess changes that affect internal control

controls.title: Monitoring Activities
controls.statement: The entity selects, develops, and performs ongoing and separate evaluations of internal control, and communicates deficiencies for corrective action.

children.title: Perform ongoing and/or separate evaluations
children.statement: Perform ongoing and/or separate evaluations

children.title: Evaluate and communicate control deficiencies
children.statement: Evaluate and communicate control deficiencies

controls.title: Control Activities
controls.statement: The entity selects and develops control activities and general technology controls that mitigate risk to acceptable levels, deployed through policies and procedures.

children.title: Select and develop control activities to mitigate risk
children.statement: Select and develop control activities to mitigate risk

children.title: Select and develop general controls over technology
children.statement: Select and develop general controls over technology

children.title: Deploy control activities through policies and procedures
children.statement: Deploy control activities through policies and procedures

controls.title: Logical and Physical Access Controls
controls.statement: The entity restricts logical and physical access, manages identification and authentication, provisions and removes access, and protects against external threats.

children.title: Logical access security over protected information assets
children.statement: Logical access security over protected information assets

children.title: Register and authorize new users; remove access when appropriate
children.statement: Register and authorize new users; remove access when appropriate

children.title: Manage access based on roles and least privilege
children.statement: Manage access based on roles and least privilege

children.title: Restrict physical access to facilities and assets
children.statement: Restrict physical access to facilities and assets

children.title: Discontinue logical and physical protections on disposal
children.statement: Discontinue logical and physical protections on disposal

children.title: Protect against threats from outside the system boundary
children.statement: Protect against threats from outside the system boundary

children.title: Restrict the transmission and movement of information
children.statement: Restrict the transmission and movement of information

children.title: Prevent or detect unauthorized or malicious software
children.statement: Prevent or detect unauthorized or malicious software

controls.title: System Operations
controls.statement: The entity monitors systems for anomalies, detects and responds to security events and incidents, and recovers from them.

children.title: Detect and monitor for new vulnerabilities and configuration changes
children.statement: Detect and monitor for new vulnerabilities and configuration changes

children.title: Monitor system components for anomalies
children.statement: Monitor system components for anomalies

children.title: Evaluate security events to determine whether they are incidents
children.statement: Evaluate security events to determine whether they are incidents

children.title: Respond to identified security incidents
children.statement: Respond to identified security incidents

children.title: Recover from identified security incidents
children.statement: Recover from identified security incidents

controls.title: Change Management
controls.statement: The entity authorizes, designs, develops, tests, approves, and implements changes to infrastructure, data, software, and procedures.

children.title: Manage changes to infrastructure, data, software, and procedures
children.statement: Manage changes to infrastructure, data, software, and procedures

controls.title: Risk Mitigation
controls.statement: The entity identifies, selects, and develops risk mitigation activities, including for business disruptions and vendor/business-partner relationships.

children.title: Identify and develop risk mitigation activities
children.statement: Identify and develop risk mitigation activities

children.title: Assess and manage risks from vendors and business partners
children.statement: Assess and manage risks from vendors and business partners
